expectedAnswers: Yes, I'll be there! Thanks for inviting me.
Absolutely! I'm already looking forward to it — see you at 8pm on Maple St!
Definitely! I’ve got it marked on my calendar — can’t wait!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确确认出席，无模糊表达
语言准确性：语法正确，时态使用恰当
表达自然度：使用口语化表达，语气积极
关键词覆盖：包含时间、地点或感谢语

content.speakerText: Thanks for the invitation — I had a wonderful time!
content.speakerTextCn: 谢谢你邀请我，我玩得很开心！
expectedAnswers: You're so welcome! I'm glad you enjoyed it — take care!
It was my pleasure! Let’s do this again soon!
Thank you for saying that — I hope to see you again soon!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：礼貌回应感谢并表达积极期待
语言准确性：使用恰当的感谢回应句型
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合社交结束语境
关键词覆盖：包含感谢回应、未来期待或告别语

content.scenarioHint: 你刚刚参加完一场朋友的聚会，准备离开时想再次确认对方是否还希望你出席下周的活动，并礼貌地道别。
expectedAnswers: Just to confirm, you still want me to come next Saturday? Thanks so much for having me!
I’m really looking forward to next Saturday—just wanted to make sure it’s still on? Thanks again!
Will I see you next Saturday? I really appreciate the invite!
So we’re still on for Saturday? Thanks for everything—you’re the best!
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确确认了未来活动的出席意愿
语言准确性：语法结构正确，时态使用恰当
表达自然度：语气礼貌、符合日常口语习惯
关键词覆盖：使用了 'confirm', 'next Saturday', 'thanks/appreciate' 等场景关键词
